title: iguanura corniculata
intro: Iguanura corniculata, also known as the wild rice plant, is a type of palm tree native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the tropical regions of Indonesia and Malaysia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Iguanura corniculata include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the rhizome and roots of the plant are often used to make extracts and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
